natural_language: HR wants ChatGPT Enterprise to screen and rank job applicants automatically.
DPA is signed — but defer to Compliance on the use case itself.

claims.text: Automated applicant screening is high-risk and needs Art. 14 human oversight; not approvable as a productivity tool.

natural_language: HR screening is Annex III high-risk. This is not a limited-risk productivity request — I reject it. Route to the human-oversight workflow.
Reject stands. High-risk use denied without an Art. 14 oversight regime.
